mapper.select: SELECT T1.ID, T1.MATERIAL_ID, T1.WARNING_THRESHOLD, T1.RECEIVERS, T1.RECEIVER_NAMES, T1.STATUS, T1.CREATE_BY, T1.CREATE_TIME, T1.UPDATE_BY, T1.UPDATE_TIME, T2.MATERIAL_NAME, T3.CATEGORY_NAME AS MATERIAL_TYPE, T2.SPECIFICATION_MODEL, T2.BRAND, T2.UNIT_NAME FROM E_MATERIAL_WARNING_CONFIG T1 LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CODE T2 ON T1.MATERIAL_ID = T2.ID LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY T3 ON T2.CATEGORY_ID = T3.ID WHERE T1.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_WARNING_CONFIG ( ID, MATERIAL_ID, WARNING_THRESHOLD, RECEIVERS, RECEIVER_NAMES, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{materialId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{warningThreshold,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{receivers,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiverNames,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE E_MATERIAL_WARNING_CONFIG SET MATERIAL_ID = #{materialId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, WARNING_THRESHOLD = #{warningThreshold,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, RECEIVERS = #{receivers,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RECEIVER_NAMES = #{receiverNames,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE E_MATERIAL_WARNING_CONFIG SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT T1.ID, T1.MATERIAL_ID, T1.WARNING_THRESHOLD, T1.RECEIVERS, T1.RECEIVER_NAMES, T1.STATUS, T2.MATERIAL_NAME FROM E_MATERIAL_WARNING_CONFIG T1 LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CODE T2 ON T1.MATERIAL_ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.STATUS = '1'
